dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4601 IS: Chinese CBDC Prohibition Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Scott of Florida introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To prohibit money services businesses from engaging in any transaction that involves a central bank digital currency issued by the People’s Republic of China, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Chinese CBDC Prohibition Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Subchapter II of chapter 53 of title 31, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:
In this section, the term money services business has the meaning given the term in section 1010.100 of title 31, Code of Federal Regulations.

subsection.header: Transactions involving digital currency of the People's Republic of China
subsection.text: No money services business may engage in any transaction, directly or indirectly, that involves a central bank digital currency issued by the People’s Republic of China.
The table of sections for subchapter II of chapter 53 of title 31, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:
